chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. D- 06 of 2022. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judg 01.02.2022. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. Syed Tahir Abbas Shah, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. ~~~~~~~ As per report furnished by S.S.P Shikarpur, the subject case on re-investigation was recommended by the police to be cancelled under “B” Class. It is submitted by the learned counsel for petitioners that cognizance of the subject case has been taken by the concerned Magistrate and now it is pending trial before the Court having jurisdiction. If, it is so, then the petitioners may seek quashment of the proceedings or their acquittal, as the case may be in accordance with law, if so is advised to them. The quashment of FIR after cognizance of the offence/incident, by the concerned Magistrate is not permissible at law. The instant constitutional petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge
